# Version 3.116.1
> **3.116.1 servicing rebuild** · Released December 5, 2024 · [NuGet](https://www.nuget.org/packages/SkiaSharp/3.116.1) · [GitHub Release](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/releases/tag/v3.116.1)

> **API changes** · [SkiaSharp API diff](3.116.1/index.md) · [HarfBuzzSharp API diff](harfbuzzsharp/8.3.0.1/index.md)

## Highlights

A packaging fix and an Android NDK refresh — no API changes shipped in this servicing build.

## Breaking Changes

*None in this release.*

## Platform

- **Android NDK r27c with 16 KB page-size alignment** — The bundled Android natives are now built with NDK r27c and 16 KB-aligned to keep working on newer Android devices. ([#3098](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3098))

## Lifecycle & Internals

- **Correct PackagePath for symbol packages** — NuGet symbol packages now use the correct PackagePath attribute so debugger sources resolve as intended. ([#3102](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3102))

## HarfBuzzSharp 8.3.0.1

HarfBuzzSharp 8.3.0.1 picks up the same NDK r27c / 16 KB alignment refresh and packaging fix.
